zh.Wybunbury, Chesire, England: 英國英格蘭爾維布波瑞
zh.lifeSummary: Cicely Caldwell於大約1560年出生在英國爾維布波瑞。她於大約1576年與Richard Sharples Jr.結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1614年12月8日在英國爾維布波瑞享年55歲，埋葬在英國爾維布波瑞。

zh-hans.Wybunbury, Chesire, England: 英国英格兰爾維布波瑞
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cicely Caldwell于大约1560年出生在英国爾維布波瑞。她于大约1576年与Richard Sharples Jr.结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1614年12月8日在英国爾維布波瑞享年55岁，埋葬在英国爾維布波瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Caldwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish: habitational name from any of several places in England and Scotland, variously spelled, that are named with Old English ceald ‘cold’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’. Caldwell in North Yorkshire is one major source of the surname; Caldwell in Renfrewshire in Scotland another. Possibly also from Caldwell (Warwickshire), Caldwall (Worcestershire), Cauldwell (Bedfordshire, Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire), Caudle Green (Gloucestershire), Caudle Ditch or Cawdle Fen (Cambridgeshire), Chadwell (Essex, Hertfordshire, Leicestershire, Wiltshire), Chardwell (Essex), or Chardle Ditch (Cambridgeshire, early recorded as Kadewelle).

Irish: when not the English surname, this is an Anglicized form of Ó Fuarghuis or Ó hUarghusa ‘descendant of (F)uarghus’, a personal name whose literal sense ‘cold’ + ‘choice’ was reinterpreted as coming from fuaruisce ‘cold water’.

History: Several Caldwells emigrated from Scotland to America by way of Ireland in the 18th century. James Caldwell (1734–81), a son of settler John Caldwell, was born in Charlotte County, VA, and was a militant clergyman during the revolutionary war. Andrew Caldwell, a Scottish farmer, emigrated to North America in 1718 and started a family in Lancaster County, PA. His son David was a Presbyterian clergyman and well-known revolutionary war patriot.

variants.name: Cadle
meanings: English (Gloucestershire) and Irish, both of Norman origin: nickname from Old French cadel ‘leader’.
English: variant of   Caldwell   and of   Caudill  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German   Kadel  .

variants.name: Cardwell
meanings: English and Scottish: in northern England, the West Midlands, and southwest Scotland, this surname is a variant of Caldwell . In southwestern England it is probably a variant of Cardall, a habitational name from Cardwell in Milton Abbot (Devon). See also Cardell .

variants.name: Cadwell
meanings: (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from one of two Devon places, either Cadewell (House) in Cockington or Caddywell in Great Torrington.

variants.name: Caudill
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English caudel, cadel, caudell(e) ‘hot fortified drink, esp. one containing spiced wine or ale’, also a thin gruel (Anglo-Norman French caudel, medieval Latin caldellum). Alternatively, a variant of Caldwell . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Cordwell
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Caldwell . Alternatively, in Derbyshire a habitational name from Cordwell in Holmsfield, Derbyshire, named with Old English cauld ‘cold’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Cicely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

variants.name: Cecily
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Cicely Caldwell was born about 1560, in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England. She married Richard Sharples Jr. about 1576. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 8 December 1614, in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Cicely Caldwell est née environ 1560, à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Richard Sharples Jr. environ 1576. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 décembre 1614, à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Cicely Caldwell wurde um 1560 in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England geboren. Sie hat um 1576 Richard Sharples Jr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. Dezember 1614 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England und wurde in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Cicely Caldwell è nata il circa 1560 nel Wybunbury, Cheshire, England. Lei sposato Richard Sharples Jr. circa 1576. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 dicembre 1614, nel Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Wybunbury, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Cicely Caldwellは約1560年にイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーで生まれた。約1576年にRichard Sharples Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1614年12月8日にイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーで55歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cicely Caldwell(은)는 대략 1560년 영국 체실르 윈이버버이에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1576년 Richard Sharples Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1614년 12월 8일 영국 체실르 윈이버버이에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 윈이버버이에 묻혔다.

mn.Wybunbury, Chesire, England: Wybunbury, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Cicely Caldwell nasceu aproximadamente 1560, em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Richard Sharples Jr. aproximadamente 1576. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de dezembro de 1614, em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Cicely Caldwell родилась около 1560 г. в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Sharples Jr. около 1576 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 8 декабря 1614 г. в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cicely Caldwell nació aproximadamente 1560, en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Richard Sharples Jr. aproximadamente 1576. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de diciembre de 1614, en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
